Operation 'startConsolidatedDataQuery' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too brief and lacks critical details for AI agent decision-making. Enhanced version clarifies: (1) the asynchronous nature of the operation, (2) what data is aggregated (FHIR resources from facilities), (3) what is returned (query status with ID), (4) the side effect (background processing), and (5) how to use the result (polling/retrieval pattern). This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and how to handle the response.

data.current_description: Start a consolidated data query for a patient, returning FHIR resources.
data.summary_suggestion: Initiate consolidated patient FHIR data query
data.description_suggestion: Initiates an asynchronous consolidated data query for the specified patient, aggregating FHIR resources from connected healthcare facilities. The operation returns a query status object with a query ID for tracking progress. The query processes medical documents and clinical data in the background. Use the returned query ID to poll for results or retrieve consolidated FHIR resources once processing completes.
data.reasoning: Original description is too brief and lacks critical details for AI agent decision-making. Enhanced version clarifies: (1) the asynchronous nature of the operation, (2) what data is aggregated (FHIR resources from facilities), (3) what is returned (query status with ID), (4) the side effect (background processing), and (5) how to use the result (polling/retrieval pattern). This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and how to handle the response.

message: Operation 'createConsolidatedData' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, unclear_purpose. Original description lacks specificity about inputs, outputs, and operational context. Enhanced version clarifies: (1) the action (generates/creates consolidated FHIR data), (2) the scope (aggregates from connected facilities), (3) input requirements (request body with parameters), (4) output format (FHIR bundle), (5) side effects (triggers aggregation, may be time-consuming), and (6) use cases. This enables AI agents to understand the operation's purpose, when to invoke it, what to provide, and what to expect in return.

data.summary_suggestion: Generate consolidated FHIR data for patient
data.description_suggestion: Generates and creates consolidated FHIR data for the specified patient by aggregating medical records and clinical information from connected healthcare facilities. Requires a request body with consolidation parameters. Returns the consolidated FHIR bundle containing aggregated patient resources. This operation triggers data aggregation from multiple sources and may take time to complete. The resulting consolidated data can be used for comprehensive patient record access and clinical decision support.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about inputs, outputs, and operational context. Enhanced version clarifies: (1) the action (generates/creates consolidated FHIR data), (2) the scope (aggregates from connected facilities), (3) input requirements (request body with parameters), (4) output format (FHIR bundle), (5) side effects (triggers aggregation, may be time-consuming), and (6) use cases. This enables AI agents to understand the operation's purpose, when to invoke it, what to provide, and what to expect in return.

data.current_description: Triggers a document query across the network for the specified patient.
data.description_suggestion: Initiates an asynchronous document query across the healthcare network for the specified patient. Returns a query ID that can be used to track query status and retrieve results. Query execution is performed in the background and may take several minutes to complete. Results become available as documents are discovered and aggregated.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical details about asynchronous nature, return value (query ID), expected timeline, and how to track progress. Enhanced to clarify this is a background operation with tracking capability, helping AI agents understand they need to poll for results rather than expecting immediate response.

data.current_description: Returns a presigned URL to download a document. URL expires in 60 seconds.
